calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Alliance Credit Services, Inc.
No appearance by defendant Allan Yee.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 25, 2009.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed today, July 6, 2009.
Declaration of Richard Segol in Lieu of Personal Testimony Pursuant to CCP Section 98 was filed today, July 6, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed wihtout prejudice today, July 6, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Alliance Credit Services, Inc., and against defendant Allan Yee as follows:

Principal - $4,549.53.
Interest - $993.75.
Attorney's Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $240.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $6,583.28.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2009 Set For Trial On Jul-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
